text: Office mein Boss ne sabke samne mujhe 'slow UPSC dropper' bol kar zaleel kiya, par maine bas sir jhuka kar maafi maang li. Gaon mein kisan Papa ki puri fasal barbaad ho gayi hai aur bank ki kist bounce ho gayi hai, isliye main unhe naraz karke apni naukri khatre mein nahi daal sakta. Agar main palat kar jawab deta toh parivaar ki 'izzat' aur mera ekmatra sahara dono mitti mein mil jate.

Boss roz unpaid overtime karwate hain aur mana karne par meri purani sarkari naukri ki failures ka mazak udate hain, par main chupchap sunta hoon. Ghar se khabar aayi hai ki baarish ne sab tabah kar diya aur loan ki installment nahi bhar paye, isliye unka aashirwad bachaaye rakhna hi meri majboori hai. Unse bahas karke main apne bade-buzurgo ke diye huye sanskaron aur ghar ki maryada ko thes nahi pahuncha sakta.

MNC mein Boss mujh par chillate hain par main hamesha 'ji sir' hi kehta hoon kyunki unhe bura lag gaya toh mera career khatam ho jayega. Udhar gaon mein khet ujadh gaye hain aur Sahukar ka darr hai, isliye main unse kalesh karke Papa ki tension aur nahi badha sakta. Main har zillat sahunga taaki unki 'naak' bachi rahe aur gaon mein koi ye na kahe ki UPSC ki taiyari ne mujhe badtameez bana diya.

Coaching institute ke purane investment aur ab crop destruction ke bojh ne mujhe tod diya hai, par Boss ki galiyan main bina uff kiye sun raha hoon. Agar main unhe palat kar jawab doon toh ye meri parvarish par sawal hoga aur Papa ka samman gaon mein kam ho jayega. Main bas unki har shart maan raha hoon taaki ghar ki shanti bhang na ho aur unhe mujh par garv bana rahe.

Startup ka Boss mere multi-year prep gap ka fayda uthakar mujhe nicha dikhata hai, par main unke pairon ki dhool ban kar rehne ko taiyar hoon. Gaon mein loan installment chukana namumkin ho gaya hai aur is waqt mera bagawat karna parivaar ke liye paap jaisa hoga. Main apne saare suppressed emotions daba deta hoon taaki khandaan ki 'shaan' aur Boss ke saath sambandh dono bache rahein.
